title: Conveyor Semantic Body Mechanics JSON Bundle
summary: Graph-backed body design package for all conveyor characters: CLI, runner, workers, inspector, shipper, telemetry.
doctrine: Do not store generated JS bodies inside SEJ.
Store semantic operation graphs and facade composition graphs inside SEJ.
Let the resolver materialize host-language surfaces from governed graph composition.
usage: Unzip at repo root. Prefer these semantic materialization SEJs over older blob-content materialization SEJs.
completionPosture: This package provides JSON authority. Resolver execution is still required to materialize generated surfaces and receipts.
